expectations.text: [defect_replay][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: missing scenario generation for template-save and report-builder loading
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly covers both focus areas under “Case focus coverage (required)”: (1) “Template-save (Save/Save-As → template / overwrite paths)” citing BCIN-7669 and calling out missing “Save-As → Overwrite Conflict Confirmation” transition; and (2) “Report-builder loading (prompt element loading after double-click)” citing BCIN-7727 and calling out missing verification leaves that “sub-elements must render and be interactive.”

expectations.text: [defect_replay][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md scopes the analysis to Phase 4a: “Primary checkpoint: Phase 4a” and assesses “Phase 4a contract” requirements (subcategory-only draft, scenario chains, atomic steps, verification leaves). It also states it avoids later-phase logic: “Met: This result is scoped to Phase 4a omissions … without introducing Phase 4b/5+ gating logic.”
